temporal_description:
(00:00-00:07) A woman with dark hair, wearing a purple robe over a turtleneck, screams in terror as she hides behind a white doorframe. She is being repeatedly and violently struck by an unseen assailant with a large knife. The doorframe is splintered from the blows. She flinches and covers her mouth in fear, her eyes wide with horror. (Storyline: This opening scene immediately establishes a high-stakes, violent confrontation. The woman is clearly the victim, and the unseen assailant is brutally attacking her, creating intense suspense and horror.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Screaming, terrified. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, brutal impact sounds of the knife hitting the doorframe, accompanied by a tense, percussive musical score.)
(00:08-00:09) In a brief, chaotic cut, the woman is shown from a different angle, still screaming in terror. She is now holding the large knife herself, pointing it towards the camera, as if she has momentarily gained control or is reacting to the attack. (Storyline: This quick cut introduces a new, unexpected element to the conflict. The woman, who was previously a victim, is now armed, shifting the power dynamic and adding to the chaos of the scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Screaming. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic score continues.)
